note: Curated recurring highlights at real Nantes venues. Dates are generated relative to today so the demo always shows upcoming plans. Each item links to the venue's official page.

events.title: Les Machines de l'Île – The Great Elephant
events.description: Ride the giant mechanical elephant and explore the Marine Worlds Carousel on the former shipyards.

events.title: Le Voyage à Nantes – Art Trail
events.description: Follow the painted green line across the city to discover open-air artworks and surprising installations.

events.title: Château des ducs de Bretagne – Guided Visit
events.description: Walk the ramparts and dive into the history of Nantes inside this beautifully restored ducal castle.

events.title: Concert Night at Stereolux
events.description: Live indie, electro and experimental gigs in one of the city's leading music and digital arts venues.

events.title: Exhibition at Le Lieu Unique
events.description: Contemporary art, performances and a famous bar inside the former LU biscuit factory.

events.title: Jardin des Plantes – Open-air Botanical Stroll
events.description: Seven hectares of greenhouses, sculptures and seasonal blooms right next to the train station.

events.title: Île de Versailles – Japanese Garden Walk
events.description: A peaceful Japanese-inspired island garden on the Erdre river, perfect for a slow afternoon.

events.title: Musée d'arts de Nantes – Collections
events.description: From classical masters to contemporary art in a luminous, recently renovated museum.

events.title: Live show at Le Grand T
events.description: Theatre, dance and circus performances in one of the region's main stages.

events.title: Marché de Talensac – Saturday Market
events.description: The most famous covered & open-air market of Nantes: oysters, cheese, flowers and local produce.

events.title: Concert at Zénith Nantes Métropole
events.description: Big touring artists and major shows in the metropolitan area's largest concert hall.

events.title: Hangar à Bananes – Riverside Nightlife
events.description: Bars, clubs and the Buren rings light installation along the Loire on the Île de Nantes.

events.title: Loire à Vélo – Riverside Cycling
events.description: Hop on a bike and follow the signposted Loire à Vélo route along the river out of the city.

events.title: Planète Sauvage – Safari Park
events.description: Drive-through safari and animal trails just south of Nantes – a great day out with kids.

events.title: Trempo – Emerging Music Showcase
events.description: Discover the next local bands and artists in this music incubator on the Île de Nantes.

events.title: Le Lieu Unique – Sunday Brunch & Books
events.description: Relaxed brunch, hammam and bookshop in the iconic LU tower building.

events.title: La Cité des Congrès – Festival Weekend
events.description: Conventions, fairs and festivals throughout the season in the city's main congress centre.

events.title: Parc de la Gaudinière – Outdoor Picnic
events.description: Wooded valley with streams and meadows in the north of Nantes – ideal for a sunny picnic.

events.title: Cinematic Night at Katorza
events.description: Arthouse and original-version films in a beloved independent cinema downtown.

events.title: Street Food Market on Île de Nantes
events.description: Food trucks, local craft beer and live music by the river on the creative Île de Nantes.
